title: Wynntils Upgraded
description: Wynntils is a mod designed to enhance the user experience of Wynncraft. The mods in this modpack seek to further enhance the user experience of Wynncraft through performance and visual enhancement mods.
body:
Wynntils is a mod designed to enhance the user experience of Wynncraft. The mods in this modpack seek to further enhance the user experience of Wynncraft through performance and visual enhancement mods. Now including Complimentary Shaders!

Thank you to Complimentary Shaders for allowing me to use them in this modpack! More information on these shaders can be found here https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/

Server IP: play.wynncraft.net

All settings are on default.

Mod List 

- Better F3: More info in F3 menu

- Chat Heads: Shows player heads in chats

- Controlling: Search for keybinds

- CraftPresence: Discord integration

- Entity Culling: Skips rendering non-visible blocks and entities

- Euphoria Patches: Adds more features to Complementary Shaders

- FerriteCore: Memory usage optimizations

- FPS Reducer: Reduces FPS when inactive to reduce GPU and CPU load

- ImmediatelyFast: Various Optimizations

- Iris: Allows shaders to run with Sodium

- ModernFix: Improves perfomance, reduces memory usage, fixes bugs.

- Model Gap Fix: fixes https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-73186

- Neoforge Version 21.1.57: [https://projects.neoforged.net/neoforged/neoforge](https://projects.neoforged.net/neoforged/neoforge)
  
- No Chat Reports: Disables Chat Reporting where legally possible

- Notes: Adds in-game notepad [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notes)

- Skin Layers 3D: Replaces second layer with 3d modeled version

- Sodium: Performance booster

- Spark: Performance profiler

- Wynntils: https://wynntils.com
